title: Cobblemon Modular Poké Balls
description: Craft fully customisable Poké Balls by choosing apricorn colours for each part and a core material that sets the catch rate. 6 tiers, infinite colour combinations.
body:
## Modular Poké Balls

**Ever dreamed of catching a Pikachu in a matching yellow Poké Ball? What about a Gengar in a purple one with a red button? Well, dream no longer, now you can!**

Introducing **Modular Poké Balls**: the first Cobblemon addon that lets YOU design every inch of your Poké Ball. Mix and match **16 apricorn colours** across 4 visual parts, drop in a core material to set your catch power, and walk away with a ball that's entirely your own. No two throws need ever look the same again.

***

### How It Works

Craft the **Modular Ball Workbench** using one of every apricorn colour, an iron ingot in the centre, and a crafting table at the base. Pop it down, slot in your apricorns for the lid, rim, button, and base, choose your core (copper, iron, gold, diamond, netherite, or a nether star) and out comes your personalised ball.

Need colours you don't have? **Dye any apricorn** by combining any standard apricorn with a matching dye in a crafting grid to get one of 9 new colours: orange, magenta, light blue, gray, light gray, cyan, purple, brown, and khaki.

Items placed in the workbench persist when you close the GUI. A floating 3D preview of your ball appears above the block when a valid recipe is set, and a flat 2D sprite sits on the tabletop facing you. Drop any finished modular ball into the core slot (with the apricorn slots empty) to put it on display.

***

### Ball Tiers & Catch Rates

| Ball        |Core            |Catch Rate |
| ----------- |--------------- |---------- |
| Poké Ball   |Copper Ingot    |1×         |
| Great Ball  |Iron Ingot      |1.5×       |
| Ultra Ball  |Gold Ingot      |2×         |
| Giga Ball   |Diamond         |3×         |
| Zeta Ball   |Netherite Ingot |5×         |
| Master Ball |Nether Star     |Guaranteed |

All six tiers share the same customisation system. The only thing that changes is the catch power. Each ball displays its catch rate as a grey subtitle, right on the item. Hold **Shift** over any modular ball to see which colours were used for each part.

***

### Features

*   6 ball tiers with colour-coded names, from humble Poké Ball to legendary Master Ball
*   16 apricorn colours, 7 standard Cobblemon colours plus 9 new craftable dyes
*   Dye any apricorn to its matching colour via shapeless crafting
*   Your colours show everywhere: inventory, thrown, in-hand, party, PC, and summary screens
*   Thrown and send-out animations faithfully reflect your custom design
*   Floating 3D ball preview above the workbench when output is ready
*   Drop any finished ball in the core slot to display it on the table
*   Workbench drops itself and its contents when mined
*   Colours survive world reload, throwing, missing targets, and capture

***

### Requirements

*   **Cobblemon** 1.6+ for NeoForge 1.21.1
*   **Kotlin for Forge**

***

### Planned Features _(if this addon gets popular)_

*   Modular Lid Press, craft special lids (Great, Ultra, Beast patterns) with multi-colour support
*   Ancient Modular Balls with matching animations
*   Dye blending for custom colours beyond the standard sixteen
*   Modular Poké Rods

_This mod is a passion project, my first mod, built in my spare time. If people enjoy it, I'll gladly expand it. Feedback and suggestions are always welcome._
